Activity.Description: Chien truong Tong – Kim la noi ma tat ca nhan si vo lam co the thoai mai PK, so tai cao thap cung nhau ma khong so mat di trang bi, diem kinh nghiem. Boi vay moi khi su kien chien truong Tong – Kim dien ra trong server deu thu hut rat dong cac game thu Vo Kiem tim den de khang dinh dang cap, ban linh PK cua minh.
Activity.MsgTips: Den chieu mo su tong, kim o cac thanh thi de bao danh

Activity.Description: Bach Ho Duong la mot trong nhung tinh nang moi la trong Vo Kiem. Khi tham gia vao tinh nang nay nhan si se duoc the hien tai chien dau cung bang hoi cua minh. Ngoai ra phan thuong sau khi tham gia tinh nang nay cung rat hap dan.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Su Gia Bach Ho Duong o cac thanh thi de bao danh

Activity.Description: Long Mon Tieu Cuc noi danh vo kiem, da tung ap tieu thanh cong cho rat nhieu bao vat gia tri lien thanh nen rat duoc nhan si giang ho kinh trong. Tuy nhien, nghe noi gan day viec lam an cua tieu cuc ngay cang phat trien nhung nhan luc lai chua the dap ung, vi the de dam bao an toan cho cac chuyen tieu, ong chu Luc Tam Can quyet dinh tuyen mo cac hiep khach chung tay bao ve tieu xa.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Ong Chu Tieu Cuc o cac thanh thi de nhan nhiem vu

Activity.Description: Hien tai trong quan doanh tren duoi chi vung nhu thanh, dong long gop suc giup Han Dai Nhan chuan bi chien dau, nguoi co ranh roi thi di do tham xem. Hoan thanh Hau Phuc Nguu Son, Bach Man Son, Hai Lang Vuong Mo moi pho ban 1 lan khao sat tinh hinh nghia quan tuong si.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Thong Linh thanh thi de nhan nhiem vu

Activity.Description: Tuong truyen,Thuy Hoang Dia Cung la noi chon cat vo so bau vat cung binh khi co mot khong hai tren giang ho. Khong it ke vi tham bao vat da phai vinh vien tro thanh ke canh gac lang mo vi am khi muon trung va vo so cam bay nguy hiem ma Tan Thuy Hoang da sap dat tu khi ong ta con song.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Su Gia o cac thanh thi de nhan nhiem vu

Activity.Description: Cong nguyen nam 1160, vua nha Kim Hai Lang Vuong Hoan Nhan Luong xua quan nam ha, muu do chiem doat Trung Nguyen mau mo. Nhan duoc hung tin, Tong Quan cung chuan bi nghenh dich. The gioi Vo Lam lai chuyen minh noi gian - Mot thoi ky binh dao khoi lua khong the nao tranh khoi.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Ve Binh Thanh Mon o cac thanh thi de nhan nhiem vu

Activity.Description: Hat Huy Hoang va Hat Hoang Kim – loai bao duoc hiem co trong tu nhien, hap thu linh khi cua dat troi may nghin nam moi vuon len khoi long dat, dom hoa ket trai. Pham la nguoi tu luyen vo cong, bat ke theo truong phai nao, khi su dung loai qua nay deu co the gia tang cong luc boi phan.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Su Gia Hoat Dong o cac thanh thi de nhan nhiem vu

Activity.Description: Than Bi Bao Kho - Mat that toa lac noi Truong Ca Mon, noi hoc phu ngan nam lich su, cat giu biet bao bi mat kinh thien ma nguoi doi luon khao khat tim den. Do khong tam phuc truoc trieu dinh, lai bi noi gian Kim quoc kich dong, mot nhom de tu uu tu Truong Ca Mon da chiem giu noi day, cho ngay lat do Dai Tong, xay dung mot xa hoi ly tuong.
Activity.MsgTips: Den Ma Xuyen Son o cac thanh thi de nhan nhiem vu

Activity.Description: Thi dau mon phai la hoat dong dac sac chi co rieng tai Vo Kiem. Day la noi cao thu cac phai tranh tai voi dong mon de gianh lay danh hieu Tan Nhan Vuong mon phai, duoc Chuong mon trao quyen Dai su huynh - Dai su ty uy danh khap thien ha.
Activity.MsgTips: Den chuong mon de tham gia bao danh

Activity.Description: Cong Thanh Chien la chien truong phan dinh thang thua giua cac dai hung bang trong thien ha nham chiem lay quyen thong tri va ap dat thue suat len that dai thanh thi vi quyen loi cua bang hoi.
Activity.MsgTips: Den NPC Tiep Dau Cong Thanh Chien de tham gia bao danh

Activity.Description: Chien truong Tong – Kim lien may chu la noi ma tat ca nhan si vo lam co the thoai mai PK, so tai cao thap cung nhau ma khong so mat di trang bi, diem kinh nghiem. Boi vay moi khi su kien chien truong Tong – Kim dien ra trong server deu thu hut rat dong cac game thu Vo Kiem tim den de khang dinh dang cap, ban linh PK cua minh.
Activity.MsgTips: Den chieu mo su tong, kim o Hoang Thanh de bao danh
